title: Overlay cache and merge
description:
## Intent
As a console user, I want an overlay cache that can override Git-backed reads so that I see realtime changes without breaking Git as the source of truth.

## Definition of Done
- Overlay layout and merge rules implemented in Rust and Python.
- Tombstones supported for deletes.
- JIT cleanup and overlay GC command available.
- Git hooks run overlay GC after merges and checkouts.
creator: ryan.porter

comments.text: Progress: Filed overlay reconcile feature work as tasks 3.5/3.6/3.7 and started implementation on 3.5. Evidence: new tasks created under overlay epic with cleanup/hook/test scope. Next: implement reconcile prune command and wire CLI. Risk/Blocker: none.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Progress: Completed reconcile cleanup feature delivery (tasks 3.5/3.6/3.7). Evidence: new overlay reconcile command, hook lifecycle wiring, docs updates, and passing Rust/Python tests; system-wide kbs/kbsc binaries reinstalled from current code. Next: if desired, unset core.hooksPath in target repos and run  to activate git-triggered reconcile+gc. Risk/Blocker: hook installation is intentionally prevented while core.hooksPath=/dev/null.
